About Me

Building intelligent systems for tomorrow

Enthusiastic and detail-oriented Software Engineer— with hands-on experience in mobile and desktop app development, industrial automation, and machine learning.

From architecting blockchain-based contracts to building taxi prediction models, I love turning complex problems into elegant software. I have real-world industrial experince with SCADA systems and digital twins.

I'm eager to collaborate with forward-thinking teams to make a meaningful impact through technology.

Career

Where I've worked

Junior Software Engineer — Intern
Konkola Copper Mines plc · Engineering Department
January – February 2026
  • Gained hands-on experience with industrial control systems and SCADA environments using KEPServerEX, RsView Enterprise, and FactoryTalk View SE.
  • Contributed to digital transformation by co-creating a 3D digital twin of the mine using Matterport, improving visualization and documentation.
  • Exposed to underground and surface mining technologies, deepening understanding of instrumentation and operational automation.
  • Strengthened technical analysis skills through system monitoring and engineering support tasks.
BSc Software Engineering
Zambia Centre for Accountancy Studies (ZCAS), Lusaka
2022 – 2026
  • Specialising in software design, machine learning, cryptography, and system architecture.
  • Appointed ZCASU ICTAZ Student Chapter Events & Logistics Chairperson (2023–2024).
  • Completed Cisco Networking Basics Certificate (2025).
